title: Dashboard
description: Get a comprehensive overview of all bookings and leads at a glance with real-time insights and analytics.

title: Account & Team Management
description: Create and manage team members while setting up fixed or recurring holidays as blackout days.

title: Blackout Days
description: Easily configure unavailable dates by setting up blackout days for your business calendar.

title: Leads Management
description: View, manage, and edit all created leads in one centralized table with complete control.

title: Bookings
description: Convert confirmed leads into bookings and manage all your confirmed reservations efficiently.

title: Calendar View
description: Visualize all leads and bookings in a date-wise calendar format for better planning and organization.

title: Purchase Orders
description: Add vendors for services, manage purchase orders, and track outstanding payment amounts seamlessly.

title: Reports & Analytics
description: Access in-depth analysis of debtors and creditors with comprehensive financial reporting tools.
